google_sheets.note: No dedicated Google Sheets MCP in this session. Google Drive MCP exists in the broader tool inventory but heartbeat marks it 'not authorized for unattended scheduled runs'. No lead-capture sheet has been provisioned. lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet remains null on all three fields. Suggested action: authorize Drive/Sheets MCP for unattended access, then create and register the lead-form sheet (sheet_id + tab_name) before flipping campaign_state.simulation to false.

wati.note: campaign_state.json wati.status='needs_account'. No account, no Client ID, no sales agent identity recorded. Required for (a) inbound WhatsApp lead ingestion via templates, and (b) outbound HOT-lead alert to sales agent. Until account exists, HOT-lead escalation cannot be automated, and the campaign cannot legally trigger WA template messages from the +639542555553 or +639958565865 numbers via API.

hubspot.note: campaign_state.json hubspot.status='not_setup'. No CRM destination, no deal pipeline, no owner routing. Leads will have no persistent record beyond _completed/{date}/lead_updates.json until provisioned.

brevo.note: campaign_state.json brevo.status='needs_account'. Required for nurture email sequences after a lead is captured. Lead-check itself does not write to Brevo, but absence of Brevo means lead -> email-nurture path is broken downstream.

meta_lead_ads.note: Meta Ads MCP is reachable (ad account live and ACTIVE per recent heartbeats) but no Lead Ads forms exist and no lead-form-to-sheet/CRM bridge is configured. If Meta Lead Ads will be a capture channel at launch, the form schema must be designed to match the expected lead schema below and the leadgen webhook or CRM sync must be set up.

field_constraints.investment_amount: Numeric in lead's preferred currency, plus currency code (PHP/ILS/USD)
field_constraints.country: ISO-3166 alpha-2 (IL, PH, US, etc.) preferred; free text accepted if country picker not deployed
field_constraints.phone: E.164 format; required for WATI HOT-lead alert routing

hot_lead_criteria_recorded: message mentions: reservation, contract, payment, deposit, transfer

suggested_actions: 1. Create the lead-capture Google Sheet. Use the expected_lead_schema fields above as the header row. Record sheet_id and tab_name in _status/lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet and set header_row_validated=true.
2. Authorize Google Drive (or a dedicated Google Sheets MCP) for unattended scheduled-task access so the 13:00 PHT LEAD_CHECK can read the sheet without human re-auth.
3. Create WATI account, obtain Client ID, register the sales agent's WA number, and add WATI MCP to the scheduled-task tool inventory. Without WATI, HOT-lead escalation cannot be automated.
4. Stand up HubSpot (or an equivalent CRM destination) and decide deal-pipeline stages, owner routing, and lead-source UTM mapping before launch.
5. Stand up Brevo for downstream email nurture once a lead is captured.
6. Install Meta Pixel 1599211187973958 and Google Tag AW-18095957436 on primevilla.ph (code already staged in _status/tracking_codes_install.html).
7. Reconcile IL fixed pricing across CLAUDE.md, campaign_state.json, and SKILL rule #4 to a single source of truth before any lead-facing price quote can be sent.
8. Reconcile Meta ad account ID (campaign_state.json vs live MCP) before any live ad spend.
9. Align scheduled-tasks cron with documented PHT slots, or rewrite agent prompts to match actual fire times (LEAD_CHECK has fired 08:02 PHT for six consecutive days).
10. Generate _queue/2026-06-02/ with explicit LEAD_CHECK tasks once at least one lead source is provisioned.

lead_state_after_run.rationale: PREPARATION mode. No sheet provisioned. No polling performed. last_check intentionally left null until first successful LIVE poll.
